titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Buildings Constructed for Yale University's Bicentennial Photographs
Buildings Constructed for Yale University's Bicentennial Photographs
titlestmt.author: compiled by Staff of Manuscripts and Archives

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.
This collection contains 15 published digital objects. And those objects are comprised of 30 digital files.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Saturday July 30, 2022 at 07:08

did.unittitle: Buildings constructed for Yale University's bicentennial photographs
did.abstract: The materials consist of photographs of buildings constructed for the Yale bicentennial. The bulk of the collection documents the University Dining Hall and Woolsey Hall. One photograph documents construction in 1901.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 46-B (YRG 46-B), Records and materials documenting individual Yale buildings, facilities, and grounds.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Buildings Constructed for Yale University's Bicentennial Photographs (RU 697). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by topic.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The materials consist of photographs of buildings constructed for the Yale bicentennial. The bulk of the collection documents the University Dining Hall and Woolsey Hall. One photograph documents construction in 1901.

dao.linktitle: Aerial photograph of Yale Campus centered on the Bicentennial Buildings, post 1931.
Aerial photograph of Yale Campus centered on the Bicentennial Buildings, post 1931.

did.unittitle: Views from College and Grove Streets at intersection

dao.linktitle: Woolsey Hall along College Street, Memorial Hall (center domed area), and University Dining Hall (The Commons) along Grove Street.
Woolsey Hall along College Street, Memorial Hall (center domed area), and University Dining Hall (The Commons) along Grove Street.

Memorial Hall Civil War Memorial, "Memory Here Guards Ennobled Names.

altformavail.head: Existence and Location of Copies
altformavail.p: A copy of this material is available in digital form from Manuscripts and Archives. Contact Manuscripts and Archives at mssa.assist@yale.edu to request access to the digital copy.

dao.linktitle: Cenotaph in front of University Dining Hall memoralizing Yale men who died in World War I, 1914-1918.
Cenotaph in front of University Dining Hall memoralizing Yale men who died in World War I, 1914-1918.
Interior of Woolsey Hall looking south toward the stage and the Newberry Memorial Organ.
Interior of Woolsey Hall looking south toward the stage and the Newberry Memorial Organ.

altformavail.head: Existence and Location of Copies
altformavail.p: A copy of this material is available in digital form from Manuscripts and Archives. Contact Manuscripts and Archives at mssa.assist@yale.edu to request access to the digital copy.

did.unittitle: Folio, Signed etching by Louis Orr
